ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_status" (
  "vax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination status */,
  "vax_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccination status */,
  "vax_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine type */,
  "efficacy_rate" TEXT /* Efficacy rate of the vaccination status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_status_vax_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vax_type_id") REFERENCES vaccine_types ("vax_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "demo_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Specific age range */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Specific ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the week */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number (1-52) */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "week_end" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data point belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the data point belongs to */,
  "vax_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination status the data point belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Value of the data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data point belongs to */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group the data point belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_vax_id FOREIGN KEY ("vax_id") REFERENCES vaccination_status ("vax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_data" (
  "reg_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional data point */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the regional data point belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the regional data point belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the regional data point belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Value of the regional data point */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group the regional data point belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_data_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demo_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the demographic data point belongs to */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group the demographic data point belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the demographic data point belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Value of the demographic data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the demographic data point belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time of user creation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notif_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_types" (
  "vax_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine type */,
  "vax_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vax_type_id")
)
